articles.title: Early Memory Contention Checks Reduce IC Design Risks
articles.summary: Automated schematic-level contention analysis detects memory bottlenecks early, improving SoC reliability, predictability, and silicon quality. The post Early Memory Contention Checks Reduce IC Design Risks appeared first on EE Times.
